name: Patlabor: The TV Series
original_name: 機動警察パトレイバー
overview: Patlabor: The TV Series is an anime television series, created by Headgear, animated by Sunrise, and based on the Patlabor anime franchise.

trailers.title: Opening 1 | Sono Mama No Kimi De Ite (Stay The Way You Are) - Yuko Nitou [Subtitled]
